last_verdict: NOT READY TO PRODUCE EXPERIMENTAL RESULTS (Round 1 artifact review)
fixes_summary: eval_streaming.py: fixed device_idx bug — was parsing CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES raw value (e.g. 3) as device index, but PyTorch remaps to 0 when CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES is set; now uses LOCAL_RANK defaulting to 0
eval_streaming.py: added trust_remote_code=True to tokenizer and model loading (required for Qwen models)
eval_streaming.py: added RuntimeError to except clause in model loading fallback loop (was missing, only caught ImportError/ValueError)
train_spm.py: added trust_remote_code=True to tokenizer and model loading
train_ppo_integration.py: added trust_remote_code=True to tokenizer and model loading
run_all_experiments.sh: added Phase 1 output verification before Phase 3 (warns if SPM training products missing)
streaming_memory.py: fixed save() to always save adapters individually under adapters/{name}/ for consistent directory structure matching _load_checkpoint() expectations
setup.sh: added conda-only server fallback — detects python3.12/3.10/3 or conda Python, falls back to pip when uv unavailable
Added tests/test_streaming_memory.py: 15 unit tests covering ReservoirBuffer, SessionBuffer, WorkingMemoryLoRA, LongTermMemoryLoRA, format_turn (CPU-only, no model downloads required)
Phase 1→3 connection verified: run_all_experiments.sh passes --checkpoint_dir $SPM_DIR to eval_streaming.py, SPMMethod._load_checkpoint looks for final/ subdirectory correctly
eval_streaming.py: PersonaChat sessions now grouped by persona_id instead of sequential chunking — ensures each session maintains consistent persona identity
eval_streaming.py: LIGHT dataset handler preserves character description as persona instead of setting empty string
eval_streaming.py: added proxy-metric docstrings to _rouge_l_f1, semantic_persona_retention, compute_bleu clarifying they are ROUGE-L/simplified-BLEU proxies for NLI-based retention
README.md: PPO Policy phase marked as (auxiliary); added note that Phase 2 is experimental and not required for main contribution
Added tests/test_integration.py: checkpoint roundtrip, persona session grouping, reservoir buffer, session buffer reset
